inputs.name: in
inputs.label: Database Name
inputs.description: Name for the new database (overrides the Name property).

outputs.name: out
outputs.label: Entry (JSON)

outputs.name: name
outputs.label: Database Name
outputs.description: Confirmed name of the new database.
